title: Convert website to mobile app format with app-like UI/UX

requirements.summary: Implement bottom navigation bar for primary navigation replacing header-based navigation
acceptanceCriteria: Bottom navigation bar is fixed at the bottom of the viewport on all customer-facing pages
Navigation items have icons and labels
Active navigation item is visually highlighted
Navigation bar is responsive and works on mobile, tablet, and desktop viewports

file_operations.description: Create a bottom navigation bar component with icons and labels for Home, Services, Gallery, Testimonials, and Chat sections. Use TanStack Router's Link component with active state detection. Include touch-optimized tap targets (minimum 44x44px) and visual highlighting for the active route. Make it fixed at the bottom of the viewport with proper z-index.

Integrate the new BottomNav component into the Layout. Conditionally render BottomNav for non-admin pages. Add bottom padding to the main content area to prevent overlap with the fixed bottom navigation bar. Keep the existing header but prepare for simplification in REQ-31.

requirements.summary: Update Layout header to mobile app-style with minimal top bar showing only logo and essential actions
acceptanceCriteria: Header displays company logo on the left
Header is compact and mobile-optimized
No horizontal navigation links in the header
Header remains consistent across all pages

file_operations.description: Simplify the header to show only the company logo on the left and LoginButton on the right. Remove all horizontal navigation menu items. Make the header compact and mobile-optimized with minimal height. Ensure the header remains visible across all pages and works with the bottom navigation bar.

requirements.summary: Implement swipeable page transitions between main sections for native app-like navigation gestures
acceptanceCriteria: Horizontal swipe gestures navigate between adjacent pages
Smooth animated transitions when swiping
Visual feedback during swipe gesture
Swipe navigation works on touch devices

file_operations.description: Create a custom hook that implements touch event handlers for horizontal swipe gestures. Detect swipe direction (left/right), calculate swipe distance, and trigger navigation to adjacent pages when threshold is met. Include visual feedback during swipe (e.g., page shift animation). Define the page order: Home -> Services -> Gallery -> Testimonials.

Create a wrapper component that uses the useSwipeNavigation hook to enable swipe gestures on customer-facing pages. Add smooth CSS transitions for page changes. Include visual indicators during swipe (optional drag effect).
Wrap the HomePage content with SwipeContainer to enable swipe navigation to ServicesPage.
Wrap the ServicesPage content with SwipeContainer to enable swipe navigation to Gallery and back to Home.
Wrap the ProjectGalleryPage content with SwipeContainer to enable swipe navigation to Testimonials and back to Services.
Wrap the TestimonialsPage content with SwipeContainer to enable swipe navigation back to Gallery.

requirements.summary: Add pull-to-refresh functionality on all customer-facing pages that reloads page data
acceptanceCriteria: Pull-down gesture triggers refresh animation
Data is refetched after pull-to-refresh
Loading indicator shows during refresh
Works on touch-enabled devices

file_operations.description: Create a custom hook that implements pull-to-refresh functionality using touch events. Detect pull-down gesture from the top of the page, show a loading spinner or refresh indicator, and trigger a callback to refetch data. Include threshold detection and smooth animations.
Create a wrapper component that uses usePullToRefresh hook and displays the refresh indicator. Accept a callback prop for the refresh action and wrap child content with pull-to-refresh behavior.
Wrap HomePage content with PullToRefreshContainer and implement a refresh callback that invalidates relevant queries (projects preview, reviews, etc.) using React Query's queryClient.
Wrap ServicesPage content with PullToRefreshContainer. Since this page is mostly static, the refresh callback can be minimal or trigger a simple page reload.
Wrap ProjectGalleryPage content with PullToRefreshContainer and implement a refresh callback that invalidates the projects query to refetch gallery data.
Wrap TestimonialsPage content with PullToRefreshContainer and implement a refresh callback that invalidates the reviews query to refetch testimonial data.

requirements.summary: Optimize all page layouts for mobile-first vertical scrolling with card-based designs and increased touch target sizes
acceptanceCriteria: All interactive elements meet minimum 44x44px touch target size
Content is organized in scrollable card-based layouts
Spacing and typography are optimized for mobile readability
Single-column layouts are prioritized for mobile viewports

file_operations.description: Add mobile-first CSS utility classes for touch-friendly interactions. Define minimum touch target sizes (44x44px), increased padding for mobile cards, and optimized typography scales for mobile readability. Add utility classes for mobile card layouts with proper spacing.

Refactor the hero section and features into mobile-optimized card-based layouts. Use single-column layouts on mobile with proper spacing. Ensure all buttons and interactive elements meet 44x44px minimum touch target size. Increase font sizes for mobile readability.

Redesign service cards for mobile-first vertical scrolling. Use single-column layout on mobile viewports with large touch-friendly cards. Increase padding and spacing between service items for better touch interaction.

Optimize gallery grid for mobile with larger touch targets. Use single-column or 2-column grid on mobile devices. Ensure project cards have adequate spacing and tap areas. Make category filter buttons touch-friendly (minimum 44x44px).

Redesign review cards for mobile-first display. Use single-column layout on mobile with card-based design. Ensure rating filter buttons meet minimum touch target size. Optimize typography for mobile readability.

requirements.summary: Convert chat widget to full-screen modal chat interface that opens from bottom navigation bar
acceptanceCriteria: Chat opens as a full-screen overlay from the bottom nav
Chat interface follows mobile messaging app patterns
Back/close button returns to previous page
Message input is fixed at the bottom of the chat screen

file_operations.description: Transform the existing floating ChatWidget into a full-screen modal interface. Add a close/back button in the header. Style the chat messages to follow mobile messaging app patterns (bubbles, timestamps). Fix the message input at the bottom of the screen. Make it open/close based on a prop or context state.
Add a Chat navigation item in the BottomNav that opens the full-screen ChatWidget modal when tapped. Use state management (e.g., React state or context) to control the chat modal visibility.
Update Layout to render the ChatWidget as a full-screen modal overlay when active, instead of as a floating widget. Ensure it appears above all other content with proper z-index.

requirements.summary: Add haptic feedback for key user interactions on devices that support the Vibration API
acceptanceCriteria: Button taps trigger subtle haptic feedback
Form submissions provide haptic confirmation
Navigation changes include haptic feedback
Haptic feedback gracefully degrades on unsupported devices

file_operations.description: Create utility functions for haptic feedback using the Vibration API. Implement different haptic patterns for different interaction types (tap, success, error). Include feature detection to gracefully handle unsupported devices.
Add haptic feedback when navigation items are tapped using the haptics utility.
Add haptic feedback when sending messages or opening/closing the chat using the haptics utility.
Add haptic feedback on form submission success using the haptics utility.
Add haptic feedback on form submission success using the haptics utility.

requirements.summary: Implement native-like loading states and skeleton screens for all data-fetching operations
acceptanceCriteria: Skeleton screens display during initial page loads
Smooth fade-in animations when content loads
Shimmer effects on skeleton elements
Loading states match the layout of loaded content

file_operations.description: Create a reusable skeleton card component with shimmer animation effects. Use gradient animations to create a native-like loading shimmer. Make it configurable for different card layouts (project card, review card, service card).
Add CSS keyframe animations for skeleton shimmer effects and fade-in transitions. Define utility classes for smooth content loading animations.
Replace loading spinners with skeleton screens that match the project card layout. Add fade-in animation when project data loads. Use SkeletonCard component during the loading state.
Replace existing skeleton loaders with enhanced SkeletonCard components that match review card layout. Add shimmer effects and fade-in animations when review data loads.
Add skeleton screens for the features and services preview sections during data loading. Use fade-in animations when content appears.
Add skeleton screens for quotation cards during loading. Use SkeletonCard component and fade-in animations when quotation data loads.

requirements.summary: Update form pages to use mobile-optimized form controls with bottom sheets and touch-friendly inputs
acceptanceCriteria: Select inputs open as bottom sheet drawers
Date picker uses native mobile date input
Input fields are large and touch-friendly
Keyboard types match input context (numeric, email, etc.)

file_operations.description: Create a reusable bottom sheet component that slides up from the bottom of the screen. Include backdrop overlay, swipe-to-dismiss gesture, and smooth animations. Make it configurable for different content types (select options, date picker, etc.).
Create a select input component that opens options in a BottomSheet instead of a native select dropdown. Display options as large touch-friendly list items in the bottom sheet.

Replace the service type select input with BottomSheetSelect component. Update the deadline input to use native date input type. Increase input field sizes for touch-friendly interaction. Add appropriate inputMode and type attributes (email for email, tel for phone). Ensure all form controls meet 44x44px minimum touch target size.

Replace the project type select input with BottomSheetSelect component. Increase input field and textarea sizes for touch-friendly interaction. Add appropriate inputMode attributes. Ensure all form controls including the rating selector meet 44x44px minimum touch target size.

Update form inputs to be mobile-optimized with larger touch targets. Add appropriate inputMode and type attributes for email and phone inputs. Ensure all form controls meet 44x44px minimum touch target size.
